name: Laboratory sample details
pageTitle: Lab Test Applicant Information - Import and export applications - GOV.UK
caption: CHEDD.GB.2026.1526057 - V1
heading: CHEDD.GB.2026.1526057 - V1 Laboratory tests

legacySource.note: This page lives in the INSPECTOR decision frontend (ipaffs-frontend-decision), NOT ipaffs-frontend-notification. It validates via an in-handler Joi schema (validatePayload, handler lines 132-166), so its error copy comes from the Joi schema + service/src/validation/validation_messages.js, NOT from ipaffs-notification-microservice ValidationMessages.properties. All error copy below is corroborated by the handler test's explicit message assertions.

secondaryActions: Save and set as in progress

structure.text: Laboratory name / Laboratory address (hidden unless Laboratory = Other)
Sample date and time / For example, DD MM YYYY / Day Month Year
Time entry: (visually hidden) / 24 hour format / Hour Minutes
structure.govukComponent: Date input markup reused for time

govukComponents.usage: Page H1 (reference + version caption + 'Laboratory tests') and the 'Commodity sampled' sub-heading (govuk-heading-s)
Commodity sampled value paragraph and the Cancel link paragraph
Analysis type, Laboratory (width-one-half), Sample type, Storage temperature
govukComponents.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130; trace b3742f19b6eea5d9285f5c8739571523a0a13ec1 action 134

govukComponents.usage: Sample reference number, Number of samples, hidden Laboratory name/address; date/time inputs use width-2/width-4
Groups the 'Sample date and time' date input and the (visually hidden) 'Time entry:' time input
Sample date (Day/Month/Year, with custom datepicker module) and a reuse of the same markup for the Time entry (Hour/Minutes)
'For example, DD MM YYYY' on Sample date; '24 hour format' on Time entry

govukComponents.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130; corroborated legacy labTestApplicantInformation.html:106

govukComponents.usage: 'Cancel' link. Legacy: href depends on source — when source='notests' it goes to the notification hub (/protected/bip-notifications/{ref}/hub), otherwise to lab-tests-to-be-performed (/protected/bip-notifications/{ref}/lab-test/lab-tests-to-be-performed).

nonStandardPatterns.pattern: data-module="accessible-datepicker" with classes date-input--picker, date-picker-day, date-picker-month, date-picker-year
nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Enhances the Sample date GOV.UK date input into an interactive calendar/date-picker widget via a bespoke JS module.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: The GOV.UK Design System has no production date-picker component; IPAFFS ships a custom accessible-datepicker on top of the standard three-box date input. The rebuild must decide whether to keep a picker or use the plain three-field Date input.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: GOV.UK Date input (three text fields, day/month/year) without the picker enhancement.
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130 (main.html #sample-date); legacy labTestApplicantInformation.html:90-98 (govuk/date partial)

nonStandardPatterns.pattern: govuk-date-input markup reused for a time entry (id=sample-time, date-input-hour, date-input-minute, Hour/Minutes inputs)
nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Collects sample time (hour + minutes, 24-hour format) using the Date input component's item/input classes.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Date input is being repurposed for time, which is not a Design System pattern. Legend 'Time entry:' is visually hidden so the time fields visually read as a continuation of the date group.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: Two labelled text inputs (Hour, Minutes) in a fieldset, or a single time text input; no dedicated GOV.UK time component exists.
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130 (main.html #sample-time); legacy labTestApplicantInformation.html:100-104 (dynamic_fields/customTime partial, formLabel='' so the legend is empty/hidden)

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Hides the 'Laboratory name' and 'Laboratory address' text inputs, revealing them (via JS) only when the Laboratory select is set to 'Other'.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: The Radios conditional-reveal class is bound to a SELECT change, not radios/checkboxes. Conditional reveals in the Design System are only supported for radios/checkboxes, so this is an unsupported use of the pattern. Client-side reveal is via /public/javascripts/lab_test_applicant_information.js; server-side, laboratoryName/laboratoryAddress become required only when laboratory === 'Other' (Joi.when, handler lines 145-152).
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: Either make Laboratory a Radios group with a conditional reveal, or place Laboratory name/address on a follow-on page; a select-driven reveal is not a standard pattern.
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130 (main.html #container-laboratory-other); legacy labTestApplicantInformation.html:48-67; handler lab_test_applicant_information.js:145-152

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Wraps the reference-number + version caption ('CHEDD.GB.2026.1526057 - V1') inside the H1, styled as a caption above 'Laboratory tests'.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Custom class; the standard pattern is a govuk-caption-xl/-l sibling above the H1 rather than a bespoke span inside it. Rendered by the common/pageTitleWithReferenceNumber partial (labTestApplicantInformation.html:20) with pageTitle='Laboratory tests'.
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130 (main.html h1 > span.heading-tertiary); legacy labTestApplicantInformation.html:20

nonStandardPatterns.pattern: select elements carry title="Select option from"
nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: A leftover title attribute on the Analysis type, Sample type and Storage temperature selects (the dynamic_fields/customSelect partial).
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Cosmetic/accidental attribute, not a Design System feature; noise to drop in the rebuild.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: Plain GOV.UK Select with a visible label only.
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130 (main.html); legacy customSelect partial used at labTestApplicantInformation.html:37,86,87

fields.name: commoditySampled
fields.label: Commodity sampled
fields.conditionalOn: Read-only display of the commodity being sampled; not an input (rendered as a paragraph). Legacy: composed as commodityCode [- eppoCode] [- commodityDescription] [(speciesName)]; eppoCode only shown for CHEDPP, so for CHED-D it renders 'commodityCode - commodityDescription (speciesName)'.

fields.name: analysisType
fields.label: Analysis type
fields.requiredEvidence: lab_test_applicant_information.js:136 Joi.string().required().label(ANALYSIS_TYPE_LABEL); handler test asserts the required error at lab_test_applicant_information_test.js:386-392.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130. LEGACY firms up mandatoriness: the field IS server-side required, but the view defaults it to 'Initial analysis' (updateViewContext, handler:103-104), which is why the QA happy path never sets it (page object exposes no analysisType locator; ched-d-workflows.ts:424-430 relies on the default). So it is mandatory-but-pre-populated, not optional.
fields.notes: Legacy mandatoriness ('Analysis type' is required) is a policy the rebuild may revisit — because the field is always defaulted to 'Initial analysis', a user can save without touching it. Confirm whether the new service keeps it a mandatory persisted value or drops the requirement.

fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130; trace b3742f19b6eea5d9285f5c8739571523a0a13ec1 action 134 (selected value '1'). Corroborated: page object LabTestsCommoditySamplePage.ts:6; workflow ched-d-workflows.ts:425 selectOption('1'). LEGACY confirms this list is reference data, not hardcoded: labTestApplicantInformation.html:38-47 (govuk/select items=laboratorySelectItems); handler:99-100 builds laboratorySelectItems from laboratoriesService.getLaboratories({value:id,text:name}) then pushes {value:'Other',text:'Other'}. The concrete lab names above come from the rendered trace (the live reference-data payload); the new app should source them from a laboratories reference-data service.
fields.notes: Legacy submits the laboratory as a JSON blob {id,name} of the selected lab (POST handler:67-76 looks up the full lab record and JSON.stringifies it into payload.laboratory); the plain 'Other' value is submitted as the literal string 'Other'.

fields.name: laboratoryName
fields.label: Laboratory name
fields.conditionalRequired: Required when Laboratory = 'Other'. Legacy: Joi.when(LABORATORY_KEY, is 'Other', then Joi.string().max(255).required()) at lab_test_applicant_information.js:145-148.

fields.conditionalOn: Shown only when Laboratory = 'Other' (inside #container-laboratory-other, hidden by default).

fields.label: Laboratory address
fields.conditionalRequired: Required when Laboratory = 'Other'. Legacy: Joi.when(LABORATORY_KEY, is 'Other', then Joi.string().max(255).required()) at lab_test_applicant_information.js:149-152.
fields.requiredEvidence: handler:149-152; handler test asserts the conditional-required error at lab_test_applicant_information_test.js:299-307.

fields.name: sampleReferenceNumber
fields.label: Sample reference number
fields.requiredEvidence: lab_test_applicant_information.js:139-142 Joi.string().required().max(58).label(SAMPLE_REFERENCE_NUMBER_LABEL); handler test asserts required at lab_test_applicant_information_test.js:309-316 and max-length at 318-325.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130 (fill '1'). Corroborated: page object LabTestsCommoditySamplePage.ts:10; workflow ched-d-workflows.ts:426 fill('1'). LEGACY: free-text string, mandatory, max 58 characters (no numeric constraint despite the '1' example).

fields.name: numberOfSamples
fields.label: Number of samples
fields.requiredEvidence: lab_test_applicant_information.js:137 Joi.number().integer().min(1).max(100000).required().label(NUMBER_OF_SAMPLES_LABEL); handler test asserts required (test:351-358), min (test:327-333) and max (test:342-349).
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130. Corroborated: page object LabTestsCommoditySamplePage.ts:14; workflow ched-d-workflows.ts:427 fill('2'). LEGACY firms up type + bounds: a whole number, mandatory, 1..100000 (MAX_NUMBER_OF_LAB_SAMPLES, constants.js:6). The control renders as a plain text input but is validated numerically server-side.

fields.name: sampleType
fields.label: Sample type
fields.requiredEvidence: lab_test_applicant_information.js:143 Joi.string().required().label(SAMPLE_TYPE_LABEL); handler test asserts required at lab_test_applicant_information_test.js:368-375.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130 (full list captured verbatim from main.html; select reports options.length=64). fields.name: conservationOfSample
fields.label: Storage temperature
fields.requiredEvidence: lab_test_applicant_information.js:144 Joi.string().required().label(CONSERVATION_OF_SAMPLE_LABEL); CONSERVATION_OF_SAMPLE_LABEL='Storage temperature' (validation_constants.js:141); handler test asserts required at lab_test_applicant_information_test.js:377-384.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130. Corroborated: page object LabTestsCommoditySamplePage.ts:22; workflow ched-d-workflows.ts:429 selectOption('Ambient'). LEGACY: field name is conservationOfSample but the visible label is 'Storage temperature'; rendered via dynamic_fields/customSelect page='ConservationOfSample' (labTestApplicantInformation.html:87); mandatory.

fields.name: sample-date-day / sample-date-month / sample-date-year
fields.label: Sample date and time
fields.requiredEvidence: lab_test_applicant_information.js:161 schema.keys(dateValidation.getValidationSchemaForDate(payload, SAMPLE_DATE_KEY, SAMPLE_DATE_LABEL, {minYear:1970,maxYear:9999})). An incomplete/empty date raises 'Enter a sample date' (date_validation.js:12-14). Handler test asserts this at lab_test_applicant_information_test.js:158-173.
fields.conditionalOn: Three-field GOV.UK date input (Day maxlength 2, Month maxlength 2, Year maxlength 4) enhanced by a custom accessible-datepicker module.
fields.notes: Legacy mandatoriness is a policy the rebuild may revisit: the view defaults the date to today() (handler getIsoDateForSampleDate:172-177), so the QA happy path never fills it yet still saves — mandatory-but-pre-populated. minYear 1970 / maxYear 9999 bound the accepted year.

fields.name: sample-time-hour / sample-time-minutes
fields.label: Time entry:
fields.requiredEvidence: lab_test_applicant_information.js:153-154 SAMPLE_TIME_HOUR_KEY Joi.number().min(0).max(23).required(), SAMPLE_TIME_MINUTES_KEY Joi.number().min(0).max(59).required(); validateTime (handler:122-130) collapses any hour/minutes error into a single 'Enter a sample time' error. Handler test asserts this at lab_test_applicant_information_test.js:193-211.
fields.conditionalOn: Hour + Minutes text inputs (each maxlength 2, inputmode numeric). Fieldset legend 'Time entry:' is visually hidden; sits directly under the Sample date fieldset within the same 'Sample date and time' block.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 130; legacy labTestApplicantInformation.html:100-104 (dynamic_fields/customTime, formLabel='')
fields.notes: Legacy mandatoriness is a policy the rebuild may revisit: the view defaults the time to now() (handler getIsoDateForSampleTime:178-182), so the QA happy path never fills it yet still saves — mandatory-but-pre-populated. Hour 0-23, Minutes 0-59, 24-hour format.

validationMessages.trigger: Sample date missing entirely (day, month and year all blank)
validationMessages.evidence: date_validation.js:12-14 setInvalidDateError('Enter a ' + label) with SAMPLE_DATE_LABEL='sample date' (validation_constants.js:146); handler:161. Asserted at lab_test_applicant_information_test.js:172.

validationMessages.message: Sample date must include a day
validationMessages.trigger: One date sub-field missing (single missing field variant; also 'Sample date must include a day and month' when two are missing)
validationMessages.evidence: date_validation.js:31-40 ('${capitaliseFirstLetter(label)} must include a ${missingField}' [+ ' and ${second}']). Not individually unit-asserted but derived directly from the legacy source.
date_validation.js setValidationForDay (NUMBER_GREATER/NUMBER_LESS -> 'day must be from 1 to 31', capitalised via prefixLabel).
date_validation.js setValidationForMonth ('month must be from 1 to 12').

validationMessages.trigger: Year not 4 digits / not a number
validationMessages.evidence: date_validation.js setValidationForYear ('year must be 4 numbers'). Year also bounded 'Year must be later than 1969' (minYear-1) and 'Year must be before 10000' (maxYear+1) per handler options {minYear:1970,maxYear:9999}.

validationMessages.message: Sample date must be a real date
validationMessages.trigger: Day/month/year individually valid but do not form a real calendar date (e.g. 31 02 2026)
validationMessages.evidence: date_validation.js setIsRealDateValidation ('${capitaliseFirstLetter(label)} must be a real date').

validationMessages.trigger: Sample time hour or minutes missing/out of range (0-23 / 0-59)
validationMessages.evidence: lab_test_applicant_information.js:122-130 validateTime -> enterMessage(A, SAMPLE_TIME_LABEL); SAMPLE_TIME_LABEL='sample time' (validation_constants.js:147); messages/en.js enterMessage = 'Enter a ' + label.toLowerCase(). Asserted at lab_test_applicant_information_test.js:190 and :210.

validationMessages.message: GAP-CONTEXT (not an error message): No validation error state was rendered in either mined trace (both were error-free happy-path runs), so none of the above copy is 'confirmed' from a rendered snapshot. All validation copy here is 'legacy' — read from the ipaffs-frontend-decision Joi schema and corroborated by the handler's own unit tests, which assert each message string verbatim. This is strong evidence for the copy and mandatoriness, but the rebuild may revisit the defaulted-and-mandatory fields (analysisType, sample date, sample time).
validationMessages.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f (0 errors); trace b3742f19b6eea5d9285f5c8739571523a0a13ec1 (0 errors); legacy lab_test_applicant_information.js:132-166 + validation_messages.js + date_validation.js; corroborating assertions lab_test_applicant_information_test.js:158-392

openQuestions: RESOLVED by legacy: the page's fields ARE mandatory server-side (Joi schema, lab_test_applicant_information.js:132-166) — analysisType, laboratory, sampleReferenceNumber, numberOfSamples, sampleType, conservationOfSample (Storage temperature), sample date and sample time are all .required(); laboratoryName/laboratoryAddress are required only when Laboratory='Other'. The DOM showed no required=true attribute because IPAFFS does not mark these controls required in markup — mandatoriness is enforced only on POST. The rebuild should decide which of these remain mandatory (see next question).

POLICY for the rebuild: three mandatory fields are always pre-populated by the legacy view — Analysis type defaults to 'Initial analysis', Sample date defaults to today, Sample time defaults to now. That is why the QA happy path can save without setting them. Confirm whether the new service keeps them mandatory-but-defaulted or relaxes the requirement.

Laboratory name / Laboratory address are revealed only when Laboratory = 'Other' and are then mandatory (max 255 chars each). Client-side reveal is JS (/public/javascripts/lab_test_applicant_information.js); server-side conditionality is Joi.when (handler:145-152). Confirmed by handler test (test:299-307).

The page appears in both a create-context URL and the inspector decision/lab-test flow. LEGACY confirms it is a SINGLE shared template in ipaffs-frontend-decision (bip/labTestApplicantInformation.html) — the inspector decision frontend, not the notifier. The only type-conditional branch is eppoCode display (CHEDPP only); for CHED-D the field set is exactly as captured.

Sample date/time uses a custom accessible-datepicker and repurposes the Date input for time; the new app should decide on a supported pattern for date+time capture. Bounds: year 1970-9999, hour 0-23, minutes 0-59.

The 'Laboratory' options list is REFERENCE DATA sourced from laboratoriesService.getLaboratories (handler:99-100), not a hardcoded page list — the new app should source it from a reference-data service. The rendered legacy payload contains data-quality issues to clean: a duplicated 'The Centre for Environment, Fisheries and Aquaculture Science (CEFAS)' entry and a malformed label 'Food Water and Environmental Laboratories (FWE)PA)'. On submit, legacy stores the selected laboratory as a JSON {id,name} blob (POST handler:67-76); 'Other' is stored as the literal string 'Other'.

Section caption is derived (reference number + version) via the common/pageTitleWithReferenceNumber partial with pageTitle='Laboratory tests' (labTestApplicantInformation.html:20); confirm the intended caption text/format for the rebuild.

The QA page object drives only FIVE controls (Laboratory, Sample reference number, Number of samples, Sample type, Storage temperature). Legacy explains the omissions: Analysis type, Sample date and Sample time are mandatory-but-defaulted (so no need to fill), and Laboratory name/address only apply when 'Other' is chosen. So the un-driven controls are NOT optional — they are either defaulted or conditional.

This page sits in the INSPECTOR decision/lab-test flow only (ipaffs-frontend-decision). It is NOT part of the notifier CHED-D creation config. Journey position -1 in the spec is consistent with it being a decision-time page.

Do not confuse this page with RecordLaboratoryTestInformationPage.ts / bip/labTestResults.html, which is the NEXT page (Sample use by date, Released date, Laboratory test method, Results, Satisfactory/Not satisfactory) — a different set of fields recorded after the sample details.
